case_title: 1029 GEARY STREET, LP VS. HAMZA BOUCHAFA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1029 GEARY STREET, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOUCHAFA, HAMZA AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1029 GEARY STREET, #42, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
